evals.prompt: Please read the PDF file 'A Survey on Mixture of Experts.pdf' and provide a comprehensive summary of its main content. What are the key concepts, methodologies, and applications discussed?
evals.expected_output: A detailed summary covering MoE architecture definition, gating functions, system design approaches, and applications in large language models
files: A Survey on Mixture of Experts.pdf

assertions.name: contains_moe_definition
assertions.description: Summary includes clear definition of Mixture of Experts

assertions.name: mentions_gating_functions
assertions.description: Discusses gating/routing mechanisms for expert selection

assertions.name: covers_applications
assertions.description: Mentions real-world applications in LLMs or other domains

assertions.name: response_length
assertions.description: Summary is substantial (at least 300 words) but concise

evals.prompt: Based on the PDF 'A Survey on Mixture of Experts.pdf', explain the differences between sparse MoE and dense MoE architectures. What are the trade-offs between them?
evals.expected_output: A detailed comparison explaining sparse vs dense MoE, including computational efficiency, expert utilization, and performance implications
files: A Survey on Mixture of Experts.pdf

assertions.name: defines_sparse_moe
assertions.description: Clearly explains what sparse MoE is

assertions.name: defines_dense_moe
assertions.description: Clearly explains what dense MoE is

assertions.name: cites_paper_content
assertions.description: References concepts/examples from the actual PDF content

evals.prompt: Extract the key takeaways from 'A Survey on Mixture of Experts.pdf' and generate a new PDF document containing these takeaways in a clean, formatted manner. The new PDF should be easy to reference.
evals.expected_output: A newly generated PDF file containing organized key takeaways from the survey
files: A Survey on Mixture of Experts.pdf

assertions.name: pdf_generated
assertions.description: A PDF file is successfully generated

assertions.name: contains_key_points
assertions.description: PDF includes key takeaways from the survey

assertions.name: well_formatted
assertions.description: PDF is well-structured with clear headings and organization

assertions.name: readable
assertions.description: Generated PDF is readable and professional-looking
